caption.full:
Bonnie Tyler's funeral procession route announced for fans in Wales

Singer Bonnie Tyler passed away on July 8 at age 75. Her coffin will be brought to her home in Mumbles, traveling through Skewen, the village where she grew up. Donations are requested for Noah's Ark Children's Hospital for Wales and Cerebral Palsy Cymru.

What will you remember most about Bonnie Tyler's music?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#CelebrityNews #Hollywood #BonnieTyler #BonnieTylerFuneral
caption.firstComment: I still remember hearing Total Eclipse of the Heart for the first time — what song takes you back to her voice?

facebook.text: Bonnie Tyler's final farewell procession will take place in Wales. Fans are invited to line Newton Road from 3:15 p.m. as her coffin is brought home to Mumbles after a service in Swansea. The procession will travel through Skewen, her childhood village. What are your favorite Bonnie Tyler songs?

youtube.title: Bonnie Tyler's Funeral Procession Through Skewen
youtube.description:
Bonnie Tyler's funeral procession will travel through Skewen, the village where she grew up, following a service in Swansea. Fans are invited to line Newton Road from 3:15 p.m. to pay their respects as her coffin is brought to her home in Mumbles. Her family stated she 'unexpectedly passed away' as a result of an ongoing illness.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/celebrity/bonnie-tyler-fans-invited-to-line-the-streets-in-wales-for-final-farewell/
